testcase.name: Mark candidate as passed successfully

testcase.name: Skip candidate stage successfully with feedback
testcase.system-out: Given User is on login page.................................................passed When User enters username and password from config file.....................passed And User clicks on login button.............................................passed Then User should land on dashboard..........................................passed When User navigates to the first job in Jobs list...........................passed And User expands an initialized candidate row...............................passed And User clicks on Skip Stage button........................................passed And User clicks Add Feedback Now, enters feedback "Candidate is ready to skip this stage", and saves.passed

testcase.name: Interview creation

failure.message: ❌ Unexpected toast message: Error Invalid input: Meeting time conflicts with existing scheduled meeting.

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: ? Unexpected toast message: Error Invalid input: Meeting time conflicts with existing scheduled meeting. at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.candidate.SubmissionEngagementPage.validateSuccessToast(SubmissionEngagementPage.java:510) at com.xats.automation.tests.pages.candidate.SubmissionEngagementPage.scheduleInterview(SubmissionEngagementPage.java:365) at com.xats.automation.tests.stepdefinitions.candidate.SubmissionEngagementSteps.userCreatesInterview(SubmissionEngagementSteps.java:71) at ?.User creates a interview(file:///runner/_work/automation/automation/src/test/resources/features/5.pipeline/19_InterviewPipeline.feature:50)
